{ "description": "", "type": "alias", "params": [ { "labelText": "日期字段", "children": [ { "componentType": "select", "defaultValue": "", "name": "calcField", "selectType": "service", "selectName": "ruleFieldList", "selectOption": [], "mapType": "static", "placeholder": "", "canEditSecondTimes": true, "type": "string", "filterType": [ "datetime" ], "typeFinal": "string" } ], "tipContent": "表示时间点的日期字段", "enTipContent": "date fields representing time points", "tipTitle": "日期字段", "enLabelText": "date field", "enTipTitle": "date field" }, { "labelText": "日期函数", "children": [ { "componentType": "select", "defaultValue": "", "name": "timeunit", "selectType": "self", "selectName": null, "selectOption": [ { "name": "获取小时", "value": "h", "enName": "get hour" }, { "name": "获取天", "value": "d", "enName": "get day" }, { "name": "获取星期", "value": "w", "enName": "get week" } ], "mapType": "static", "placeholder": "", "canEditSecondTimes": true, "type": "string", "typeFinal": "string" } ], "tipTitle": "日期函数", "tipContent": "(1)获取小时的范围是0-24 
(2)获取天的范围是1-31 
(3)获取星期的范围是1-7", "enTipContent": "(1) The range of access hours is 0-24 
 (2) The range of acquisition days is 1-31 
(3) The range of acquisition week is 1-7", "enLabelText": "date function", "enTipTitle": "date function" }, { "labelText": "下限值（>=)", "children": [ { "componentType": "input", "defaultValue": "", "name": "lowerLimit", "selectSourceName": "systemList", "addonBefore": "", "addonAfter": "", "placeholder": "", "canEditSecondTimes": true, "type": "int" } ], "tipTitle": "下限值（>=)", "tipContent": "如:填写22,则表示>=22", "enTipContent": "For example, if you fill in 22, it means >= 22", "enLabelText": "lower limit value", "enTipTitle": "lower limit value" }, { "labelText": "上限值(<=)", "children": [ { "componentType": "input", "defaultValue": "", "name": "upperLimit", "selectSourceName": "systemList", "addonBefore": "", "addonAfter": "", "placeholder": "", "canEditSecondTimes": true, "type": "int" } ], "tipTitle": "上限值（<=)", "enLabelText": "upper limit value", "enTipTitle": "upper limit value", "tipContent": "如:填写5,则表示<=5", "enTipContent": "For example, if you fill in 5, it means <= 5" } ] }

templateDataList.cfgJson: {"description":"","type":"alias","params":[{"labelText":"异常类型配置","children":[{"componentType":"checkbox","defaultValue":"","name":"abnormalTags","selectType":"self","selectName":null,"selectOption":[{"name":"设备首次出现","value":"DEVICE_FIRST_SEEN","enName":"first appear"},{"name":"疑似刷机","value":"SUSPECTED_OF_WIPING_PHONE","enName":"suspected reboot"},{"name":"开机时间过短","value":"SHORT_UPTIME","enName":"boot time too short"},{"name":"本机时间异常","value":"ABNORMAL_TIME","enName":"time abnormal"},{"name":"运营商异常","value":"ABNORMAL_CARRIER_INFO","enName":"operator abnormal"},{"name":"网络信息异常","value":"ABNORMAL_NETWORK_CONNECTION","enName":"internet information abnormal"},{"name":"客户端ID异常","value":"ILLEGAL_CLIENTID","enName":"client ID abnormal"},{"name":"设备为模拟器","value":"ANDROID_EMULATOR","enName":"device simulator"},{"name":"多开","value":"MULTIPLE_RUNNING","enName":"open multiple same application "},{"name":"检测到调试器","value":"DEBUGGER_DETECTED","enName":"debugger detected"},{"name":"检测到改机工具","value":"HOOK_TOOL_DETECTED","enName":"machine information changing detected"},{"name":"设备参数被篡改","value":"DEVICE_INFO_TAMPERED","enName":"equipment parameter change"},{"name":"疑似模拟定位","value":"SUSPECTED_OF_FAKING_LOCATION","enName":"suspected simulated position"},{"name":"疑似伪造无线网络信息","value":"SUSPECTED_OF_FAKING_WIFI","enName":"suspected forge wireless network information"},{"name":"路由器厂商未知","value":"WIFI_UNKNOWN_MANUFACTURER","enName":"unknown router manufacturers"},{"name":"网卡厂商未知","value":"MAC_UNKNOWN_MANUFACTURER","enName":"unknown network card manufacturers"},{"name":"IMEI异常","value":"ILLEGAL_IMEI","enName":"IMEI Abnormal"}],"mapType":"static","type":"string","canEditSecondTimes":true}],"tipContent":""}]}
templateDataList.description: 判断设备是否处于某些异常状态
templateDataList.enDescription: Check whether the device is abnormal or not
